role: This directory contains issue templates for the ArchSpine mirror system, providing structured forms for bug reports, documentation improvements, and feature requests.
responsibility: Collectively, these templates standardize user submissions by capturing essential details for each issue type: bugs (observed vs expected behavior, reproduction steps, environment), documentation issues (links, required changes), and feature requests (problem description, proposed solution, alternatives).

children.role: Bug report template for the ArchSpine mirror project
Standardized template for submitting feature requests to the ArchSpine project, ensuring consistent structure and clear articulation of new workflow needs.
